ex.jp: インターネットの接続が不安定で、作業が進まない。
ex.en: The internet connection is unstable, so the work isn't progressing.

qs.s: ケーブルの＿＿＿＿が緩んでいたため、画面が映らなかった。
qs.en: The cable connection was loose, so the screen wouldn't display.
qs.e: 接続 = connecting devices, networks, or lines. 接触 = physical contact/touching. 連結 = coupling (train cars). 結合 = bonding/union (chemistry, abstract joining).

qs.s: 「接続」の意味は？
qs.e: 接続 is used for hooking things up — ネット接続 (internet connection), 接続詞 (conjunction), 乗り換え接続 (train transfer connection).

m: natural; obvious; to be expected; ordinary

ex.jp: 約束を守るのは当たり前のことだ。
ex.en: Keeping a promise is only natural.

qs.s: 毎日使えていた水道が、＿＿＿＿ではないと災害で気づいた。
qs.en: The disaster made me realize that running water, which I'd used daily, isn't something to be taken for granted.
qs.e: 当たり前 = natural, obvious, taken for granted. 出鱈目(でたらめ) = nonsense, random/false. 大げさ = exaggerated. あべこべ = reversed, the other way around.

qs.s: 「当たり前」の意味は？
qs.e: 当たり前 means something is so normal or reasonable it needs no explanation (当たり前のことを言う = to state the obvious).

ex.jp: 思い掛けないところで昔の友人に会った。
ex.en: I ran into an old friend in an unexpected place.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿知らせに、彼女は言葉を失った。
qs.en: At the unexpected news, she was at a loss for words.
qs.e: 思い掛けない = unexpected, unforeseen. やむを得ない = unavoidable, can't be helped. 申し訳ない = inexcusable, very sorry. 数えきれない = countless, too many to count.

qs.s: 「思い掛けない」の意味は？
qs.e: 思い掛けない describes something you never anticipated (思い掛けない出来事 = an unforeseen event). Commonly written 思いがけない.

ex.jp: この町は外国の都市と文化交流を続けている。
ex.en: This town continues cultural exchange with cities abroad.

qs.s: 留学を通して、様々な国の学生と＿＿＿＿を深めた。
qs.en: Through studying abroad, I deepened my interaction with students from various countries.
qs.e: 交流 = mutual interaction/exchange between people or groups. 交換 = swapping concrete things. 交差 = crossing/intersecting. 交代 = taking turns, alternating.

qs.s: 「交流」の意味は？
qs.e: 交流 emphasizes ongoing human or cultural interaction (国際交流 = international exchange, 交流会 = social/networking event). Also means alternating current (AC).

ex.jp: 箱の中身を確認してから、サインしてください。
ex.en: Please check the contents of the box before signing.

qs.s: 見た目は立派だが、話の＿＿＿＿が全くなかった。
qs.en: It looked impressive, but the talk had no substance at all.
qs.e: 中身 = contents or substance, what's actually inside. 表面 = surface. 外見 = outward appearance. 本物 = the real thing/genuine article.

qs.s: 「中身」の意味は？
qs.e: 中身 contrasts with appearance — it's the actual content or substance (財布の中身 = wallet contents, 中身のある議論 = a substantive discussion).

ex.jp: 彼はいきなり立ち上がって部屋を出て行った。
ex.en: He suddenly stood up and left the room.

qs.s: 準備運動もせずに＿＿＿＿走り出すと、けがをしやすい。
qs.en: If you start running abruptly without warming up, you're prone to injury.
qs.e: いきなり = suddenly, with no lead-up. うっかり = carelessly, absent-mindedly. じっくり = carefully, taking one's time. そっくり = exactly alike; entirely.

qs.s: 「いきなり」の意味は？
qs.e: いきなり stresses that something happens with no preparation or warning (いきなり質問された = was asked out of the blue). Similar to 突然 but more colloquial.

ex.jp: 上達のためには毎日の練習を継続することが大切だ。
ex.en: To improve, it's important to keep up daily practice.

qs.s: 資金不足のため、プロジェクトの＿＿＿＿が難しくなった。
qs.en: Due to lack of funds, continuing the project became difficult.
qs.e: 継続 = continuing an activity or effort (often deliberate). 持続 = sustaining a state/level. 連続 = consecutive, unbroken sequence. 存続 = survival/continued existence of an organization.

qs.s: 「継続」の意味は？
qs.e: 継続 = keeping an action going over time (継続は力なり = perseverance pays off, lit. 'continuation is strength'). 連続 emphasizes back-to-back sequence instead.

ex.jp: この出版社は専門的な書籍を多く扱っている。
ex.en: This publisher handles many specialized books.

qs.s: 電子＿＿＿＿の普及で、紙の本の売上が減っている。
qs.en: With the spread of e-books, sales of paper books are declining.
qs.e: 書籍 = books/publications (formal). 書類 = documents/paperwork. 文章 = written text/passage/sentence. 雑誌 = magazine.

qs.s: 「書籍」の意味は？
qs.e: 書籍 is the formal word for books, used in publishing and commerce (電子書籍 = e-book, 書籍化 = turning into a book). 本 is the everyday word.

m: at least; at the very least

ex.jp: 完成までに少なくとも一週間はかかるだろう。
ex.en: It will take at least a week to complete.

qs.s: 全員は無理でも、＿＿＿＿半数の賛成は必要だ。
qs.en: Even if not everyone, we need at least half to agree.
qs.e: 少なくとも = at least (a minimum bound). せいぜい = at most, at best (an upper limit). わざわざ = going out of one's way. 今にも = at any moment now.

qs.s: 「少なくとも」の意味は？
o: at least; at the very least
going out of one's way to
qs.e: 少なくとも sets a minimum (少なくとも三人 = at least three people). Its opposite is せいぜい (at most).

ex.jp: 間も無く電車が到着いたします。
ex.en: The train will arrive shortly.

qs.s: 開演まで＿＿＿＿ですので、お席にお戻りください。
qs.en: The performance will begin shortly, so please return to your seats.
qs.e: 間も無く = soon, before long (a short time from now). とっくに = long ago, already. いつまでも = forever, indefinitely. たまたま = by chance, happened to.

qs.s: 「間も無く」の意味は？
qs.e: 間も無く (often written まもなく) means a short time from now. Common in announcements (まもなく発車します = departing shortly).

ex.jp: 五千円以上のお買い上げで送料は無料になります。
ex.en: Shipping is free for purchases over 5,000 yen.

qs.s: 商品は安かったが、＿＿＿＿を含めると割高だった。
qs.en: The item was cheap, but including shipping it was rather expensive.
qs.e: 送料 = shipping/postage cost specifically. 料金 = fee/charge (general). 代金 = the price/payment for goods. 手数料 = handling/service fee, commission.

qs.s: 「送料」の意味は？
qs.e: 送料 specifically covers the cost of sending/delivering something (送料無料 = free shipping, 送料込み = shipping included).

ex.jp: 最近は自宅で仕事をする人が増えた。
ex.en: Recently more people work from home.

qs.s: 退院後はしばらく＿＿＿＿で療養することになった。
qs.en: After being discharged, he was to recuperate at home for a while.
qs.e: 自宅 = one's own home/residence. 住所 = address (the location/written address). 宿舎 = dormitory/lodging (provided housing). 実家 = one's parents' home/family home.

qs.s: 「自宅」の意味は？
qs.e: 自宅 = the home where you live (自宅勤務 = working from home, 自宅療養 = recovering at home). 実家 specifically means the family home you grew up in.

ex.jp: 開会式の前後は会場がとても混雑する。
ex.en: The venue is very crowded before and after the opening ceremony.

qs.s: 会費は一人五千円＿＿＿＿を予定しています。
qs.en: We're planning a membership fee of around 5,000 yen per person.
qs.e: 前後 after a number = approximately/around that amount. 以上 = that amount or more. ばかり = only/just about. 限り = as far as/limit. Note: 前後 also means 'before and after.'

qs.s: 「前後」の意味は？
qs.e: 前後 means 'before and after' (前後の文脈 = surrounding context) and, after a quantity, 'approximately' (三時前後 = around 3 o'clock). It can also mean the order/sequence of things.

ex.jp: 明日の降水確率は七十パーセントだ。
ex.en: Tomorrow's chance of rain is seventy percent.

qs.s: この治療法で回復する＿＿＿＿は非常に高い。
qs.en: The probability of recovery with this treatment is very high.
qs.e: 確率 = probability/likelihood of an event. 比率 = ratio/proportion between quantities. 効率 = efficiency. 割合 = proportion/percentage of a whole.

qs.s: 「確率」の意味は？
qs.e: 確率 expresses how likely something is to happen (確率が高い = high probability, 成功の確率 = chance of success). Distinct from 割合 (a share of a whole).

ex.jp: 医師の診断によると、ただの疲労だそうだ。
ex.en: According to the doctor's diagnosis, it's just fatigue.

qs.s: 会社は社員に年に一度の健康＿＿＿＿を義務づけている。
qs.en: The company requires employees to have an annual health check-up.
qs.e: 診断 = diagnosis (the doctor's conclusion/assessment). 診察 = the act of examining a patient. 検査 = testing/inspection (e.g. blood test). 治療 = treatment/therapy.

qs.s: 「診断」の意味は？
qs.e: 診断 is the conclusion a doctor reaches (健康診断 = health check-up, 診断書 = medical certificate). Also used figuratively (経営診断 = business assessment).

ex.jp: 会社は新しい経営体制に移行した。
ex.en: The company shifted to a new management structure.

qs.s: 災害に備えて、二十四時間対応の＿＿＿＿を整えた。
qs.en: In preparation for disasters, they set up a 24-hour response system.
qs.e: 体制 = organizational system/structure/setup (how a group is arranged to function). 体格 = physique/build (of a body). 態度 = attitude/manner. 姿勢 = posture, or one's stance toward something.

qs.s: 「体制」の意味は？
qs.e: 体制 refers to how an organization or society is structured to operate (政治体制 = political system, 受け入れ体制 = reception/support setup).

m: to aim at; to aspire to; to set one's sights on

ex.jp: 彼は医者になることを目指して勉強している。
ex.en: He is studying with the goal of becoming a doctor.

qs.s: チームは全国大会での優勝を＿＿＿＿、毎日練習している。
qs.en: The team practices every day, aiming to win the national tournament.
qs.e: 目指す = to aim for/aspire to a goal. 見つめる = to gaze at/stare. 見直す = to review/reconsider. 見送る = to see someone off; to pass on (an opportunity).

qs.s: 「目指す」の意味は？
o: to aim at; to aspire to a goal
qs.e: 目指す means to set a goal and work toward it (頂上を目指す = head for the summit, 優勝を目指す = aim for victory).

ex.jp: 観覧車がゆっくりと回転している。
ex.en: The Ferris wheel is slowly rotating.

qs.s: この店は客の＿＿＿＿が速いので、すぐに席が空く。
qs.en: This restaurant has fast customer turnover, so seats open up quickly.
qs.e: 回転 = rotation/turning, or turnover (cycling of customers, stock). 循環 = circulation (blood, money flowing in a loop). 移動 = movement from place to place. 変化 = change/transformation.

qs.s: 「回転」の意味は？
qs.e: 回転 = spinning/turning (回転寿司 = conveyor-belt sushi) and figuratively turnover or quickness (頭の回転が速い = quick-witted).

m: trigger; opportunity; the thing that starts something

ex.jp: その出会いがきっかけで、彼は画家になった。
ex.en: That encounter was what led him to become a painter.

qs.s: 留学が日本語に興味を持つ＿＿＿＿になった。
qs.en: Studying abroad became the trigger for my interest in Japanese.
qs.e: きっかけ = the trigger/catalyst that starts something. おかげ = thanks to (positive cause). わけ = reason/circumstance. せい = fault/blame (negative cause).

qs.s: 「きっかけ」の意味は？
o: trigger; the thing that starts something
qs.e: きっかけ is the catalyst or opening event that sets something in motion (〜をきっかけに = triggered by / using ~ as an opportunity).

ex.jp: この作業には特殊な道具が必要だ。
ex.en: This task requires special tools.

qs.s: それは＿＿＿＿なケースで、普通は起こらない。
qs.en: That is a special case; it doesn't normally happen.
qs.e: 特殊 = special, unusual, out of the ordinary. 普通 = ordinary/normal. 平凡 = mediocre, commonplace. 一般 = general/common (the broad norm).

qs.s: 「特殊」の意味は？
qs.e: 特殊 emphasizes that something is exceptional or specialized, differing from the norm (特殊技能 = specialized skill). Its antonym is 一般 (general).

m: the day in question; the very day; that day

ex.jp: チケットは当日でも購入できます。
ex.en: Tickets can be purchased even on the day itself.

qs.s: 予約は前日までに、＿＿＿＿のキャンセルはご遠慮ください。
qs.en: Please reserve by the day before; we ask that you refrain from same-day cancellations.
qs.e: 当日 = the very day (of an event). 当時 = back then, at that time (a past era). 前日 = the day before. 翌日 = the next day.

qs.s: 「当日」の意味は？
o: the very day; the day in question
qs.e: 当日 refers to the actual day an event takes place (当日券 = same-day ticket, 当日券売り場 = day-of box office). Don't confuse with 当時 (in those days).

ex.jp: 試験が終わって、ようやくプレッシャーから解放された。
ex.en: With the exam over, I was finally released from the pressure.

qs.s: 人質は無事に＿＿＿＿され、家族のもとへ戻った。
qs.en: The hostages were safely released and returned to their families.
qs.e: 解放 = liberation/freeing from restraint or suffering. 開放 = opening up (a space/market to access). 釈放 = legal release of a prisoner. 放置 = leaving something neglected/unattended.

qs.s: 「解放」の意味は？
qs.e: 解放 = freeing from confinement, oppression, or burden (奴隷解放 = emancipation of slaves, 解放感 = sense of liberation). Compare 開放 (throwing open to access).

m: performance; capability; (technical) specs of a machine

ex.jp: 新しいカメラは性能が大幅に向上した。
ex.en: The new camera's performance improved significantly.

qs.s: 価格は高いが、それに見合った＿＿＿＿を備えている。
qs.en: It's expensive, but it has performance to match.
qs.e: 性能 = the performance level/capability of a machine. 性格 = personality/character (of a person). 機能 = function/feature (what it can do). 効能 = efficacy/benefits (of medicine, etc.).

qs.s: 「性能」の意味は？
qs.e: 性能 measures how well a machine performs (高性能 = high-performance, エンジン性能 = engine performance). 機能 is what features it has; 性能 is how well it does them.

ex.jp: そのバンドは十年の活動の後、解散した。
ex.en: The band broke up after ten years of activity.

qs.s: 首相は衆議院の＿＿＿＿を決断し、総選挙が行われた。
qs.en: The prime minister decided to dissolve the lower house, and a general election was held.
qs.e: 解散 = disbanding a group/parliament; people dispersing. 解消 = dissolving an arrangement/resolving (契約解消 = contract cancellation). 中止 = calling off an event. 閉鎖 = closing down a facility.

qs.s: 「解散」の意味は？
qs.e: 解散 = a group disbanding or people dispersing (国会解散 = dissolution of parliament, 現地解散 = dismissing/parting ways on site).

m: maintenance; servicing; putting in order; development of infrastructure

ex.jp: 飛行機は離陸前に入念に整備される。
ex.en: The aircraft is carefully serviced before takeoff.

qs.s: 市は自転車専用道路の＿＿＿＿を進めている。
qs.en: The city is developing dedicated bicycle lanes.
qs.e: 整備 = maintaining/servicing equipment, or developing/putting infrastructure in order. 修理 = repairing what's broken. 整理 = tidying/organizing/sorting. 建設 = construction of something new.

qs.s: 「整備」の意味は？
qs.e: 整備 means keeping equipment in working order (車の整備 = car servicing) and developing/arranging systems or facilities (法整備 = developing legislation, 環境整備 = setting up the environment).

ex.jp: この機能は標準で搭載されている。
ex.en: This feature is installed as standard.

qs.s: 彼の身長は日本人男性の＿＿＿＿よりやや高い。
qs.en: His height is slightly above the average for Japanese men.
qs.e: 標準 = the standard/norm/average level. 基準 = the criterion used to judge. 目標 = goal/target one aims for. 水準 = level/standard of quality (レベル). 標準 and 基準 overlap, but 基準 is the yardstick, 標準 the typical norm.

qs.s: 「標準」の意味は？
qs.e: 標準 = the typical or default norm (標準語 = standard language, 標準サイズ = standard size). 基準 is the reference point for judging; 標準 is the ordinary average.

m: originally; from the start; by nature

ex.jp: 彼は元々無口な人だった。
ex.en: He was a quiet person from the start.

qs.s: この土地は＿＿＿＿田んぼだったが、今は住宅地になっている。
qs.en: This land was originally rice paddies, but now it's a residential area.
qs.e: 元々 = originally, from the start (the state before any change). 今さら = now, at this late stage. そろそろ = soon, it's about time. 改めて = once more, formally/again.

qs.s: 「元々」の意味は？
o: originally; from the start; by nature
qs.e: 元々 points to how things were at the very beginning, before any change (元々の計画 = the original plan). Compare 本来 (as it ought to be by nature).

ex.jp: 道路交通法が改正され、罰則が厳しくなった。
ex.en: The Road Traffic Act was revised, and penalties became stricter.

qs.s: 労働環境を守るため、法律の＿＿＿＿が求められている。
qs.en: To protect the work environment, revision of the law is being called for.
qs.e: 改正 = formal revision/amendment of laws or rules. 改善 = improvement of a bad situation. 改革 = reform (sweeping structural change). 修正 = correction/fixing of errors or text.

qs.s: 「改正」の意味は？
o: revision; amendment of laws or rules
qs.e: 改正 specifically means amending laws, rules, or schedules (法改正 = legal amendment, ダイヤ改正 = timetable revision). 修正 is for fixing mistakes in text.

ex.jp: 何事も基礎をしっかり固めることが大切だ。
ex.en: In anything, it's important to firmly establish the fundamentals.

qs.s: 応用問題を解く前に、まず＿＿＿＿を復習しよう。
qs.en: Before tackling applied problems, let's first review the fundamentals.
qs.e: 基礎 = the foundation/basics on which more is built. 応用 = application (using basics in practice). 発展 = development/advancement. 完成 = completion.

qs.s: 「基礎」の意味は？
qs.e: 基礎 = the groundwork everything else rests on (基礎知識 = basic knowledge, 基礎工事 = foundation work). Its natural counterpart is 応用 (application).

ex.jp: レポートは決められた形式で提出してください。
ex.en: Please submit the report in the prescribed format.

qs.s: 彼の謝罪は＿＿＿＿だけで、誠意が感じられなかった。
qs.en: His apology was a mere formality; no sincerity could be felt.
qs.e: 形式 = outward form/format/formality. 内容 = content/substance. 本質 = essence/true nature. 実質 = substance/actual reality (as opposed to nominal).

qs.s: 「形式」の意味は？
qs.e: 形式 is the outward shape or set form, often contrasted with content (形式的 = a mere formality, 形式を整える = put into proper form). Opposite of 内容/実質.

ex.jp: 長時間悪い姿勢で座ると腰を痛める。
ex.en: Sitting in a bad posture for long hours hurts your back.

qs.s: 問題に真剣に取り組む彼の＿＿＿＿に好感を持った。
qs.en: I was favorably impressed by his serious attitude toward the problem.
qs.e: 姿勢 = physical posture, or one's stance/approach toward something. 態度 = attitude/manner shown in behavior. 性格 = personality. 立場 = position/standpoint (one's situation). 姿勢 and 態度 overlap, but 姿勢 stresses one's committed approach.

qs.s: 「姿勢」の意味は？
qs.e: 姿勢 = bodily posture (姿勢がいい = good posture) and figuratively one's committed stance/approach (前向きな姿勢 = a positive attitude/approach).

m: match; contest; a game where win/loss is decided

ex.jp: 最後まであきらめなければ、勝負はわからない。
ex.en: If you don't give up until the end, the outcome is anyone's guess.

qs.s: 実力が拮抗しており、なかなか＿＿＿＿がつかなかった。
qs.en: Their abilities were evenly matched, so the contest wouldn't be decided.
qs.e: 勝負 = a contest in which winning or losing is at stake (勝負がつく = the outcome is decided). 試合 = a (sports) match. 競争 = competition/rivalry. 対戦 = facing off against an opponent.

qs.s: 「勝負」の意味は？
o: a contest where win/loss is decided
qs.e: 勝負 centers on the win-or-lose outcome (勝負を挑む = to challenge, 真剣勝負 = a serious showdown). Also used figuratively for a decisive moment (ここが勝負だ = this is the make-or-break point).

ex.jp: この地域は風力で発電している。
ex.en: This region generates electricity from wind power.

qs.s: 太陽光＿＿＿＿は環境にやさしいと注目されている。
qs.en: Solar power generation is drawing attention as environmentally friendly.
qs.e: 発電 = generating electricity. 電力 = electric power (the energy itself). 充電 = charging a battery. 停電 = power outage/blackout.

qs.s: 「発電」の意味は？
qs.e: 発電 = producing electricity (発電所 = power plant, 火力発電 = thermal power generation). 電力 is the resulting power; 充電 is charging a device.

m: policy; course of action; guiding principle

ex.jp: 会社の方針に従って業務を進める。
ex.en: We carry out our work in line with company policy.

qs.s: 政府は新たな経済＿＿＿＿を打ち出した。
qs.en: The government rolled out a new economic policy.
qs.e: 方針 = a guiding policy/course of action. 方法 = method/means (how to do it). 方向 = direction (which way). 目的 = purpose/objective (the goal).

qs.s: 「方針」の意味は？
o: policy; course of action; guiding principle
qs.e: 方針 is the basic direction or policy guiding decisions (基本方針 = basic policy, 方針を決める = decide on a course of action). 方法 is the concrete how-to.

m: for now; tentatively; just in case; more or less

ex.jp: 一応、念のために確認しておきます。
ex.en: Just to be safe, I'll check it for now.

qs.s: 完璧ではないが、＿＿＿＿最後まで仕上げた。
qs.en: It's not perfect, but I more or less finished it.
qs.e: 一応 = tentatively/more or less/just in case (done to a minimal or provisional degree). 完全に = completely. やはり = as expected/after all. ますます = increasingly, more and more.

qs.s: 「一応」の意味は？
o: for now; tentatively; more or less; just in case
qs.e: 一応 signals that something is done provisionally or to a minimal extent (一応できた = it's more or less done, 一応聞いてみる = ask just in case).

m: anyway; in any case; (resignedly) after all

ex.jp: どうせ間に合わないから、急いでも無駄だ。
ex.en: We won't make it anyway, so there's no point rushing.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿やるなら、最後まで全力で取り組もう。
qs.en: If we're going to do it anyway, let's give it our all to the end.
qs.e: どうせ = anyway/in any case (often with a resigned or fatalistic tone). どうか = please (request); somehow. どうにか = somehow or other (managing). どうやら = apparently, it seems.

qs.s: 「どうせ」の意味は？
qs.e: どうせ carries a 'no matter what' or resigned nuance (どうせ無理だ = it's hopeless anyway). When paired with a positive resolve it means 'since we're doing it regardless...'

ex.jp: 公共の場所では静かにしましょう。
ex.en: Let's be quiet in public places.

qs.s: 図書館や公園などの＿＿＿＿施設は誰でも利用できる。
qs.en: Public facilities such as libraries and parks can be used by anyone.
qs.e: 公共 = public/communal (belonging to society at large). 公開 = making something open to the public (releasing/disclosing). 公式 = official/formal. 公平 = fair/impartial.

qs.s: 「公共」の意味は？
qs.e: 公共 describes things shared by or serving the general public (公共交通機関 = public transport, 公共料金 = utility charges).

m: formation; establishment; coming into effect (deal, law)

ex.jp: 両者の合意により、契約が成立した。
ex.en: With both parties' agreement, the contract was concluded.

qs.s: 新しい法律が国会で可決され、＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: The new law was passed by the Diet and came into effect.
qs.e: 成立 = an agreement/law/deal coming into being or taking effect. 成長 = growth/maturing. 完成 = completion of a物 (object/project). 達成 = achieving a goal.

qs.s: 「成立」の意味は？
o: completion of an object or project
qs.e: 成立 = the point at which something abstract is established or concluded (契約成立 = a deal is struck, 法案成立 = a bill becomes law, 取引成立 = transaction closed).

ex.jp: 資料のフォーマットを統一してください。
ex.en: Please standardize the format of the documents.

qs.s: 分裂していた国が一つに＿＿＿＿された。
qs.en: The divided country was unified into one.
qs.e: 統一 = unifying into one / standardizing to be consistent. 統合 = integrating/merging separate things into a whole. 結合 = bonding/joining together. 団結 = people uniting in solidarity.

qs.s: 「統一」の意味は？
qs.e: 統一 means bringing things together into one or making them consistent (天下統一 = unifying the realm, デザインを統一する = unify the design). 統合 stresses merging separate units.

ex.jp: そのサービスは民間企業によって運営されている。
ex.en: That service is run by a private company.

qs.s: 宇宙開発に＿＿＿＿企業が次々と参入している。
qs.en: Private companies are entering the space-development field one after another.
qs.e: 民間 = private sector / civilian (non-government). 国営 = state-run/government-operated. 公共 = public/communal. 官庁 = government office/agency.

qs.s: 「民間」の意味は？
qs.e: 民間 refers to the private, non-governmental sphere (民間企業 = private company, 民間人 = civilian). Its opposite is 官 (government) — e.g. 官民連携 = public-private partnership.

m: again; anew; on another occasion; formally

ex.jp: 詳細については改めてご連絡いたします。
ex.en: I will contact you again regarding the details.

qs.s: 彼の言葉を聞いて、平和の大切さを＿＿＿＿感じた。
qs.en: Hearing his words, I felt anew the importance of peace.
qs.e: 改めて = once again/anew (often freshly reaffirming), or formally on another occasion. 初めて = for the first time. 前もって = in advance/beforehand. 今ごろ = around now; at this late point.

qs.s: 「改めて」の意味は？
o: again; anew; freshly; on another occasion
around now; at this late point
qs.e: 改めて means doing something over again or freshly, often more formally or with renewed feeling (改めて考える = reconsider, 改めてお礼を = thank you once again).

ex.jp: 室温を一定に保つことが重要だ。
ex.en: It's important to keep the room temperature constant.

qs.s: この仕事には＿＿＿＿の経験が求められる。
qs.en: This job requires a certain (set) level of experience.
qs.e: 一定 = fixed/constant, or 'a certain set amount' (一定の〜). 相当 = considerable; corresponding to. 余分 = extra/surplus. 莫大 = enormous/vast.

qs.s: 「一定」の意味は？
o: fixed; constant; a certain set level
qs.e: 一定 means unchanging/constant (一定の速度 = constant speed) or a defined fixed amount (一定の条件 = certain set conditions).

m: reply; answer; response (to a question or survey)

ex.jp: アンケートへのご回答ありがとうございました。
ex.en: Thank you for your responses to the survey.

qs.s: 問い合わせに対する正式な＿＿＿＿は来週届く予定だ。
qs.en: The official reply to the inquiry is scheduled to arrive next week.
qs.e: 回答 = a reply/response to a question, inquiry, or survey. 解答 = the answer/solution to a problem (math, quiz). 返事 = a reply (casual, to being called or to a message). 応答 = response (real-time, e.g. on a radio).

qs.s: 「回答」の意味は？
o: reply; response to a question or survey
a casual reply to a message or call
qs.e: 回答 is a formal reply to an inquiry or survey (回答用紙 = answer sheet for a questionnaire). 解答 is reserved for solving problems with a correct answer (試験の解答 = exam answers).

ex.jp: スマートフォンは急速に普及した。
ex.en: Smartphones spread rapidly.

qs.s: 再生可能エネルギーの＿＿＿＿が世界中で進んでいる。
qs.en: The spread of renewable energy is advancing worldwide.
qs.e: 普及 = becoming widely adopted/widespread among people. 拡大 = expansion/enlargement in scale. 流行 = a trend/fashion (often temporary). 発展 = development/advancement.

qs.s: 「普及」の意味は？
qs.e: 普及 emphasizes wide adoption so something becomes common (普及率 = penetration rate, インターネットの普及 = spread of the internet). Differs from 流行 (a passing fad).

ex.jp: 不要なファイルを削除して容量を空けた。
ex.en: I deleted unnecessary files to free up space.

qs.s: 投稿が規約に違反していたため、運営により＿＿＿＿された。
qs.en: Because the post violated the rules, it was deleted by the administrators.
qs.e: 削除 = deleting/removing entirely. 追加 = adding (the opposite). 修正 = correcting/editing. 省略 = omitting/abbreviating (leaving out, often for brevity).

qs.s: 「削除」の意味は？
qs.e: 削除 means to delete or strike out (データを削除 = delete data, 削除キー = delete key). Its opposite is 追加 (add); 省略 means leaving out for brevity.

ex.jp: この情報を外部に漏らしてはいけない。
ex.en: This information must not be leaked to outside parties.

qs.s: 専門知識が足りないので、＿＿＿＿の業者に作業を委託した。
qs.en: Since we lacked expertise, we outsourced the work to an external contractor.
qs.e: 外部 = the outside/external party (beyond an organization or boundary). 内部 = the inside/internal (the opposite). 周囲 = surroundings, those around. 表面 = surface.

qs.s: 「外部」の意味は？
qs.e: 外部 refers to what is outside an organization or system (外部委託 = outsourcing, 外部からの侵入 = intrusion from outside). Opposite of 内部.

ex.jp: 二国間の相互理解を深める必要がある。
ex.en: We need to deepen mutual understanding between the two countries.

qs.s: チームの成功には、メンバー間の＿＿＿＿の信頼が欠かせない。
qs.en: Mutual trust among members is essential to the team's success.
qs.e: 相互 = mutual/reciprocal (both sides toward each other). 個別 = individual/separate. 一方 = one side only; on the other hand. 対等 = equal footing/on par.

qs.s: 「相互」の意味は？
qs.e: 相互 indicates an action or relationship going both ways (相互理解 = mutual understanding, 相互作用 = interaction). Compare 一方的 (one-sided).

ex.jp: 申し込みの期限は今月末までです。
ex.en: The application deadline is the end of this month.

qs.s: レポートの提出＿＿＿＿が明日に迫っている。
qs.en: The deadline for submitting the report is coming up tomorrow.
qs.e: 期限 = a deadline or cutoff point (the limit by which). 期間 = a span/duration of time. 時期 = a time/season/period (when). 期待 = expectation/hope.

qs.s: 「期限」の意味は？
qs.e: 期限 marks the cutoff or expiry point (締め切り期限 = deadline, 賞味期限 = best-before date, 期限切れ = expired). 期間 is the length of time instead.

m: application; formal request; petition (to an authority)

ex.jp: ビザの申請には多くの書類が必要だ。
ex.en: Applying for a visa requires many documents.

qs.s: 補助金を受け取るには、市役所で＿＿＿＿の手続きをする。
qs.en: To receive the subsidy, you complete the application procedure at city hall.
qs.e: 申請 = a formal application/request to an authority (often official). 応募 = applying in response to a recruitment/call. 提案 = a proposal/suggestion. 依頼 = a request to someone to do something.

qs.s: 「申請」の意味は？
o: application; formal request to an authority
applying in response to a recruitment call
a request asking someone to do something
qs.e: 申請 is a formal request submitted to an official body (申請書 = application form, ビザ申請 = visa application). 応募 is responding to a posted opening.

ex.jp: 睡眠不足は集中力の低下を招く。
ex.en: Lack of sleep leads to a decline in concentration.

qs.s: 年齢とともに体力の＿＿＿＿を感じるようになった。
qs.en: With age, I've come to feel a decline in my physical strength.
qs.e: 低下 = a drop in level/quality/ability. 向上 = improvement/rising (the opposite). 上昇 = a rise (in figures, temperature, price). 減少 = decrease in quantity/number.

qs.s: 「低下」の意味は？
qs.e: 低下 = a fall in level, quality, or ability (品質の低下 = quality decline, 気温低下 = temperature drop). Opposite of 向上 (improvement); 減少 is for countable amounts.
